courtRooms.judiciaryNames: Miss Atkins JP, Mrs Colman, District Judge (MC) Daber, Mr Hartopp JP, Mrs Maule-Farrell JP, Mr Rahman JP
courtRooms.welshJudiciaryNames: Atkins, Mrs  Colman,   Daber, Mr  Hartopp YH, Mrs  Maule-Farrell YH, Mr  Rahman YH

offences.offenceTitle: Occupy reserved seat / berth without a valid ticket on the Tyne and Wear Metro
offences.welshOffenceTitle: Occupy reserved seat / berth without a valid ticket on the Tyne and Wear Metro
offences.offenceWording:
Has a violent past and fear that he will commit further offences and
                interfere with witnesse

offences.offenceTitle: Possess /    control TV set with intent another use install without a licence
offences.welshOffenceTitle: Possess /    control TV set with intent another use install without a licence
offences.offenceWording: On TEST  at  TEST  used or threatened unlawful violence towards another and your conduct was such as would cause a person of reasonable firmness present at the scene to fear for his personal safety. Contrary to section 3(1) and (7) of the Public Order Act 1986.
